tables.name: amg_updates
tables.comment: This table contains information about character and other card updates.

columns.name: update_key
columns.comment: Unique key for the update, usually the calendar year and month in YYYYMM format.

columns.name: effective_date
columns.comment: Approximate date when the update was released/effective.

columns.name: update_notes
columns.comment: Notes about the update.

tables.name: characters
tables.comment: Contains information about the characters in Marvel Crisis Protocol.

columns.name: character_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the character. Should match the MTC code from Cerebro and Jarvis.

columns.name: character_name
columns.comment: Name of the character on the card.

columns.name: alter_ego
columns.comment: Name of the charcter's alter ego

columns.name: threat
columns.comment: The *threat* cost of the character.

columns.name: front_health
columns.comment: Health on the front (healthy) side of the character card.

columns.name: back_health
columns.comment: Health on the back (injured) side of the character card.

columns.name: extra_power
columns.comment: Additional power this charcter received in the power phase.

columns.name: leadership_affiliation_id
columns.comment: ID of the affilaition this charcter this character leads.

columns.name: leadership_card_id
columns.comment: ID for the team tactics cards required for this charcter to have a leadership.

columns.name: gem_bearer
columns.comment: Indicates if the character can be assigned an Infinity Gem.

columns.name: gem_limit
columns.comment: The maximum number of infinity games that can be assigned to this character.

columns.name: effective_date
columns.comment: Approximate date when the character was released or the update was released.

columns.name: update_key
columns.comment: Unique key for the update, usually the calendar year and month in YYYYMM format. Will be *NULL* if the charcter has not been updated.

columns.name: current_version
columns.comment: Indicates the current version of the character and should be *TRUE* for the latest version.

columns.name: affiliation_name
columns.comment: Name of the affiliation.

columns.name: character_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the character. Should match the MTC code from Cerebro and Jarvis.

tables.name: infinity_gems
tables.comment: Contains information about the infinity gems in Marvel Crisis Protocol.

columns.name: gem_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the  Infinity Gem. Should match the MTC code from Cerebro and Jarvis.

columns.name: gem_name
columns.comment: Name of the  Infinity Gem.

columns.name: alternate_gem_id
columns.comment: Alternate ID for the Infinity Gem.

columns.name: color
columns.comment: The color of the  Infinity Gem.

columns.name: threat
columns.comment: The additional threat cost to take the Infinity Gem.

tables.name: character_updates
tables.comment: Indicates if a charcter was part of a particular update.

columns.name: update_key
columns.comment: Unique key for the update, usually the calendar year and month in YYYYMM format.

columns.name: character_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the character. Should match the MTC code from Cerebro and Jarvis.

tables.name: product_codes
tables.comment: Information about MCP products including their release date.

columns.name: sku
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the product, usually starts with CP or MCP.

columns.name: release_date
columns.comment: Approximate US release date for the product.

tables.name: affiliations
tables.comment: Contains information about the affiliations in Marvel Crisis Protocol.

columns.name: affiliation_name
columns.comment: Name of the affiliation.

columns.name: sku
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the product, usually starts with CP or MCP.

columns.name: character_id
columns.comment: Unique identifier for the character. Should match the MTC code from Cerebro and Jarvis.
